subject: A large double-bladed battle axe planted into the ground, silhouetted against a fiery red sky with smoke and embers
description: A massive two-headed axe with a long shaft is driven into rocky ground, its blade catching crimson light. The weapon is shown in stark silhouette against a burning, smoke-choked sky filled with red and orange tones, suggesting a battlefield aftermath or raid in progress. Embers and ash drift through the air. No figures are present — the axe itself is the sole subject, framed in a dramatic low-angle composition that emphasizes its size and menace.
foreground: double-bladed battle axe planted in rocky earth
background: burning sky with smoke, embers, and red-orange glow
